declared_unit: One bearing unit which consists of one inner ring, one outer ring, rollers and retainer, corresponding to 3.85 Kg
note: This EPD uses the Upstream/Core/Downstream module framework (per PCR 2023:03) rather than standard EN 15804 A1-A3 modules. Production-stage (A1-A3 equivalent) values were approximated by summing Upstream + Core: GWP-fossil = 10.8 + 4.55 = 15.35; GWP-biogenic = -0.139 + 0.00141 = -0.1376; GWP-total = 10.7 + 4.56 = 15.26 kg CO2 eq. Downstream (end-of-life) was excluded. No separate GWP-GHG indicator was reported. Cradle-to-grave totals are GWP-fossil 1.54E+01, GWP-biogenic 0.00E+00, GWP-total 1.54E+01.
